cases.prompt: Log the decisions we made while implementing the feature and note any deviations from the plan.
cases.expected_behavior: Tracks implementation rationale and changes in direction.

cases.prompt: Capture the reasons we skipped a planned step during the refactor.
cases.expected_behavior: Records intentional deviations and why they happened.

cases.prompt: Plan the whole project from scratch.
cases.expected_behavior: This is planning, not logging implementation decisions.

cases.prompt: We changed the approach halfway through; log the before/after and the reason.
cases.expected_behavior: Records the pivot clearly for later review.
